body.visualDesc: Extreme close-up of ONE single smooth pale-cream egg nestled in dark garden soil among tiny green carrot tops. CRITICAL: there is EXACTLY ONE egg in the entire image - no other eggs anywhere, not in the background, not blurred, none. The egg is PERFECTLY SMOOTH and COMPLETELY UNCRACKED - no cracks, no lines, no damage. The egg has tipped onto its side. Pip's round face peeks up from the bottom edge of the frame, eyes enormous with wonder, beak parted in a gasp. Warm early-morning light, soft dew on the carrot leaves, shallow depth of field with empty soft-blurred soil behind.
